# assetIdentifier

**Instance Property**

The name of the audio this node plays.

## Declaration

```swift
var assetIdentifier: String { get }
```

## Discussion

This property refers to the registered identifier of the audio file. See [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASEAssetRegistry/registerSoundAsset(url:identifier:assetType:channelLayout:normalizationMode:)].
title: assetIdentifier
